focus: Resolve the residual UNVERIFIED backlog, then continue the P2 batch on skill-graph, session bootstrap/resume, and coverage-graph runtime/test drift.

graphEvents.detail: discover_graph_metadata() now fails closed on corrupt graph-metadata.json and skill_graph_scan now rejects workspace escapes, closing two previously unresolved P1 boundary findings.

session_bootstrap malformed-child extraction now records partial completeness, while skill_graph schema coverage and skill-advisor executable tests convert several prior P2 coverage complaints into ADDRESSED.
The old deep_loop_graph dead-runtime and adjacent archived-only coverage complaints are now SUPERSEDED by the live coverageGraphTools dispatcher registration and concrete handlers on current main.
